ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-11-2009 Continued To Apr-08-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Thomas Leroux for Ruell Owens (Administrator). Paul Fazio, (Bond Agent) was also present.

Mr. Leroux addressed the issues raised in the Examiner's notes except for the issue regarding the sale price of the Exxon stock as he had no information to provide to the Court. In addition, he stated that there was a tax refund pending, that he would file an interim account and that he would contact his Client to request specific responses to the questions imposed. The matter was continued to April 8, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status on filing of the interim account. Mr. Faxio informed the Court that there were two premiums past due and that another premium would be due at the end of the month. The Court directed Mr. Leroux to pay the premiums and to seek reimburesment from his Client.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Svahlin.
